raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "assertive exhortation presenting an inner-causation principle as guidance for self-elevation",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "thoughts/vision/ideal possess causal power over life trajectory independent of external conditions",
    "environment is secondary or subordinate to mental/spiritual orientation",
    "personal rise or fall is ultimately self-determined rather than collectively or materially determined",
    "a non-physical linkage exists between inner ideal and outer circumstance"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent within an idealist or mental-causation ontology; no logical contradiction arises once material primacy is denied",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "focusing on thoughts and ideals must reliably produce adaptive behavior or resilience that improves outcomes, or the statement must function as effective psychological framing without requiring literal truth",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "external structural, economic, or random factors must be primary determinants of life outcomes, rendering emphasis on inner vision either causally inert or actively harmful via victim-blaming"
}
